props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Loading…".

props.name: decorative
props.description: Hide from assistive tech (the surrounding region announces the state).

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the process is still running. While `true` (default) the loading placeholder is shown; set it to `false` when done and the default slot (the real content) is rendered in its place.

props.name: field
props.description: Show the dot field as the backdrop.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Where the label/indicator zone sits over the area.

props.name: status
props.description: Live status message — announced on every change.

props.name: detail
props.description: Extra detail line, e.g. "48 MB of 128 MB" or "3 of 8 files".
